allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=RyCugEVE4EDUXZCpDbsgc6RcPMc2HhqA psql -h dpg-d6lg7s94tr6s739s64n0-a.oregon-postgres.render.com -U spcheck_user -d spcheck_b86i -c "SHOW timezone; SELECT current_timestamp AT TIME ZONE ''Asia/Manila'' AS manila_now, current_timestamp AS utc_now;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=RyCugEVE4EDUXZCpDbsgc6RcPMc2HhqA psql -h dpg-d6lg7s94tr6s739s64n0-a.oregon-postgres.render.com -U spcheck_user -d spcheck_b86i -c "SHOW timezone; SELECT time_in, time_in AT TIME ZONE ''Asia/Manila'' as manila_time_in FROM campus_attendance WHERE time_in IS NOT NULL ORDER BY attendance_date DESC, time_in LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=RyCugEVE4EDUXZCpDbsgc6RcPMc2HhqA psql -h dpg-d6lg7s94tr6s739s64n0-a.oregon-postgres.render.com -U spcheck_user -d spcheck_b86i -c "SELECT name, setting FROM pg_settings WHERE name = ''TimeZone'';")
